text: 7-Eleven is hosting its first Bring-Your-Own-Cup Slurpee Day on Saturday from 11 a.m. to 7 p.m., where customers can fill their own cup of choice with a medium Slurpee for $1.49. In-store displays with a 10-inch diameter hole will ensure that cups are sanitary and not too large for Slurpee consumption. Customers can get creative with their cup choices, such as sand buckets or trophies. This event is not to be confused with Free Slurpee Day, which is traditionally celebrated each July 11.
